name: 6ears-spotify-ads-agent
description: 6EARS Spotify Ads Manager · Copilot Cockpit + Cloudflare approval-gated agent

scripts.test: npm run test -w 6ears-spotify-ads && npm run test -w spotify-ads-agent --if-present
scripts.release:dry: npm run privacy-audit && npm test && npm run check-pack
scripts.release:binary: npm run release:dry && npm run build:binary
